title: Caldera - Document and Data File Collection from Linux Host
description: Detects collection of document and data files from user home directories and common data paths. Caldera T1005 emulation searches for and copies high-value files (office docs, PDFs, databases, source code archives) using find and cp. Complements linux_sensitive_data_access.yaml which focuses on SSH keys and cloud credential files.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*find / -name *.pdf*' or msg like '*find / -name *.docx*' or msg like '*find / -name *.xlsx*' or msg like '*find /home -name *.doc*' or msg like '*find /home -name *.xls*' or msg like '*find /home -name *.kdbx*' or msg like '*find / -name *.pst*')) or ((msg like '*find / -name *.db*' or msg like '*find / -name *.sqlite*' or msg like '*find / -name *.sql*' or msg like '*find / -name *.bak*')) or ((msg like '*find / -name *.py*' or msg like '*find / -name *.rb*' or msg like '*find / -name *.php*' or msg like '*find / -name *.go*')) or ((msg like '*cp -r /home*' or msg like '*cp -r /root*' or msg like '*cp -r /srv*' or msg like '*cp -r /var/www*')))
falsepositives: Backup agents scanning for changed files
